reasoning: The chart completely fails to answer the business question for two main reasons: 1) It only displays data for the year 2021, whereas the question explicitly asks for revenue from 2021 to 2024. The other three years are missing entirely. 2) The x-axis labels (Jan-Dec) imply a single time series or overlapping months without distinguishing which line belongs to which year. Since there is only one data array provided in the configuration but it corresponds to 12 months of 2021, the user cannot see the trend across the requested four-year period. A correct visualization would aggregate monthly revenues into annual totals (or show all 48 months clearly labeled by Year-Month) to allow comparison across 2021-2024.
suggested_improvement: Aggregate the monthly revenue data by year to calculate total annual revenue for 2021, 2022, 2023, and 2024, then plot these four values as a bar chart or line chart with 'Year' on the X-axis.
